seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: Read Qubi LLC’s privacy policy overview for its children’s mobile products and parent-facing digital experiences.

privacy.title: Privacy, clarity and responsible product communication.
privacy.description: This page is a launch-ready placeholder for Qubi LLC’s future privacy policy. It is structured to support real legal text later without changing the design system.

blocks.title: 1. Information approach
blocks.text: Qubi intends to communicate clearly what product information is collected, how it is used and how parent-facing controls will be handled once the applications are launched.

blocks.title: 2. Children’s product sensitivity
blocks.text: Because Qubi products are built for child-oriented experiences, privacy communication should remain especially clear, parent-readable and easy to review.

blocks.title: 3. Parent-facing transparency
blocks.text: When live systems are introduced, the privacy policy should explain onboarding, account setup, optional permissions and any product analytics in simple terms.

blocks.title: 4. Future updates
blocks.text: This placeholder page can later be replaced with a production-ready privacy policy reviewed for the real launch environment, regions and compliance requirements.

seo.title: Terms of Use
seo.description: Review the placeholder terms of use structure for Qubi LLC and its future children’s mobile applications.

terms.title: Product terms prepared for future launch.
terms.description: This page is a structured placeholder for Qubi LLC’s future terms of use. It allows the site to look complete now and remain ready for formal legal content later.

blocks.title: 1. Intended use
blocks.text: Qubi applications are positioned as child-oriented digital products with parent-aware communication and clearly structured product journeys.

blocks.title: 2. Product availability
blocks.text: Store availability, download methods, supported regions and feature access can be clarified here when the real apps are published.

blocks.title: 3. Account and access conditions
blocks.text: If parent accounts, optional profiles or dashboard functionality are introduced later, the live terms page should describe those conditions clearly.

blocks.title: 4. Updates and changes
blocks.text: Qubi may revise product messaging, platform availability and legal materials as the application portfolio evolves and launches across platforms.

seo.title: Parent Safety Guide
seo.description: Explore Qubi LLC’s parent safety positioning and child-friendly digital product principles.

parentSafety.title: A clearer parent-facing explanation of how Qubi approaches child-friendly product design.
parentSafety.description: This page acts as a brand-facing safety guide and can later become a more detailed product support resource for families.

cards.title: Low-distraction UX
cards.text: Qubi aims to use calmer layouts, clearer navigation and less visual clutter in order to make product experiences feel more focused.

cards.title: Parent-readable structure
cards.text: Parents should be able to understand the product intention, navigation model and trust signals quickly.

cards.title: Age-aware communication
cards.text: Product language and interaction patterns should remain aligned with child-friendly experience principles.

cards.title: Launch-ready trust foundation
cards.text: This guide creates a strong trust layer now and can later be expanded with real support, moderation and product policy details.
